title: Chargeback
description: Per-tenant chargeback root record. One row per chargeback filed by the cardholder's bank. Carries `tenant_id` — cascades application through tenant per hierarchy.md §2. NEVER carries `application_id`, `region_id`, `organization_id`, `branch_id`, `scope_node_id`. IMMUTABLE post-terminal (ChargebackObserver refuses mutation).

chargeback_number.description: Sequential per tenant per year: `CBK-2026-00000001`. Generated by ChargebackNumberGenerator. Unique per (tenant_id, chargeback_number).

payment_id.description: Parent payment being charged back. RESTRICT.

payment_dispute_id.description: Set when the chargeback was escalated from a lost PaymentDispute. NULL when the chargeback originated directly via provider webhook.

transaction_id.description: Populated when FinalizeChargebackJob step 1 records the offsetting Transaction on lost/expired. NULL otherwise. RESTRICT.

fee_transaction_id.description: Populated when FinalizeChargebackJob step 2 records the network-fee Transaction on lost/expired. NULL otherwise. RESTRICT.

refund_id.description: Populated when RDR path is taken — RdrHandler created a Refund. NULL otherwise. RESTRICT.

network.description: Enum: visa / mastercard / amex / discover / jcb / unionpay / diners / other.

reason_code.description: Network-native reason code (Visa 10.4, Mastercard 4837, Amex F24, etc.). Validated against data/reason-code-catalog.json for the declared network.

reason_description.description: Human-readable description from reason-code-catalog. FROZEN at creation.

reason_category.description: Enum: fraud / authorization / processing_errors / consumer_disputes / card_recovery. Derived from reason_code + network + frozen at creation.

amount_cents.description: Disputed amount in cents. Positive integer.

fee_cents.description: Network chargeback fee in cents ($15-25 typical). Frozen at creation from data/network-catalog.json unless provider-communicated fee overrides.

status.description: Enum: pending_evidence / evidence_submitted / under_bank_review / won / lost / expired / accepted_refund.

evidence_due_by.description: Bank-communicated evidence deadline. Computed at creation from network default + provider-communicated override.

decision_at.description: Populated on terminal transition (won / lost / expired / accepted_refund).

provider.description: Enum: stripe / paddle / adyen / square / paypal / custom_webhook. Copied from parent payment.provider at creation.

provider_reference_id.description: Provider-native chargeback ID (Stripe dp_..., Paddle chargeback_id, etc.). Encrypted at rest.

provider_metadata.description: Provider-specific metadata (webhook payload subset). Encrypted at rest. Confidential — chargebacks.view-financials permission required.

rdr_eligible.description: Rapid Dispute Resolution eligible. Visa-only. Computed at creation.

rdr_auto_refunded.description: Set to true when RdrHandler successfully created + succeeded a refund.

rdr_deadline.description: RDR window closes. Visa communicates this via webhook. Distinct from evidence_due_by (which is the evidence deadline; rdr_deadline is the auto-refund window).

ce3_eligible.description: Compelling Evidence 3.0 eligible. Visa-only, fraud-reason-only. Computed at creation.

customer_notified.description: Whether the customer sees chargeback status in customer portal. Default false — most card networks prohibit surfacing chargeback state to customers.

filed_at.description: When the chargeback was filed by the cardholder's bank.

decision_reason.description: Bank's rationale on won/lost. Populated on decision.

outcome_reason.description: Internal ops summary on terminal state. Populated by admin via mark-lost CLI or manual review.

metadata.description: Freeform tenant-writable metadata. Confidential portions (approval_notes, rdr_acceptance_notes) admin-only.

indexes.name: chargebacks_tenant_rdr_eligible_idx
indexes.predicate: rdr_eligible = true AND status = 'pending_evidence' AND deleted_at IS NULL

x-invariants: amount_cents > 0
amount_cents <= parent payment.amount_cents - payment.amount_refunded_cents (a chargeback cannot exceed un-refunded portion of the parent payment)
currency matches parent payment.currency (no multi-currency chargebacks)
reason_code is valid for the declared network per data/reason-code-catalog.json
reason_category is derived from reason_code + network (frozen at creation)
fee_cents defaults from data/network-catalog.json for the network unless provider-communicated fee overrides
invoice_id matches parent payment.invoice_id
payment_dispute_id (when set) references a PaymentDispute with status='lost' + matching payment_id
provider is FROZEN at creation (copied from parent payment.provider)
provider_reference_id is UNIQUE globally (cross-tenant uniqueness prevents cross-tenant collision on provider-side chargeback IDs)
transaction_id + fee_transaction_id populated ONLY when status IN ('lost', 'expired') — FinalizeChargebackJob populates them
refund_id populated ONLY when status='accepted_refund' — RdrHandler populates it via refund::RefundOrchestrator
status='accepted_refund' requires rdr_eligible=true + rdr_auto_refunded=true + refund_id set
status='won' requires decision_at + decision_reason set
status='lost' requires decision_at + decision_reason set + transaction_id + fee_transaction_id populated (via FinalizeChargebackJob)
status='expired' requires decision_at (auto-set to expiration time) + decision_reason='evidence_deadline_missed' + transaction_id + fee_transaction_id populated
state transitions must follow the one-way state machine (see readme.md §3)
chargeback_number is IMMUTABLE post-create

network / reason_code / reason_category / amount_cents / currency / fee_cents / payment_id / invoice_id / payment_dispute_id / provider / provider_reference_id are IMMUTABLE post status != 'pending_evidence' (CHARGEBACK_TERMS_LOCKED)
ALL fields IMMUTABLE post-terminal status (CHARGEBACK_IMMUTABLE)
evidence_due_by can be extended (never shortened) while status='pending_evidence' — banks may extend deadlines
rdr_eligible is computed at creation + FROZEN — direct mutation refused (CHARGEBACK_RDR_ELIGIBILITY_MISMATCH)
ce3_eligible is computed at creation + FROZEN — direct mutation refused (CHARGEBACK_CE3_ELIGIBILITY_MISMATCH)
